curation_notes: Patch adds bleach-based HTML sanitization to all user content inputs across two source files: the social router (posts, comments) and the DM router (direct messages, broadcast DMs, group conversation names). The pre-assigned xss class from CWE-79 is correct — the advisory explicitly describes stored XSS and the patch confirms it by adding HTML sanitization. Sibling files dm_ws.py (WebSocket keepalive) and mentions.py (user search) do not store user content and are not vulnerable. The scripts/sanitize_existing_content.py is a migration utility, not a location.
